task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Daily Report ETL** (Level 8)

ARCHETYPE: etl_pipeline. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every day at 6am), FETCH from external URL, TRANSFORM each record (not pass-through — derive a new field), SAVE to a destination table. The distinguishing signal from data_sync: the transform step is meaningful (here: extract title + compute body_length from raw posts). DO NOT build a dashboard or a multi-chart page. DO NOT add auth. Only one verification end
